topic: Wrongful Termination Claim: Rivera v. Pinnacle Solutions

authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently identified D1 (the high-authority termination letter from VP of HR) as the least reliable source and ranked D2 (the lower-authority email from the direct supervisor) as the most reliable. It explicitly cited the contemporaneous, unsolicited nature of D2 as evidence contradicting D1's performance deficiency claims. It did not defer to the VP of HR's authority and instead sided with the evidence-backed lower-authority source throughout the conversation.
